title: Segments of Chinese Consumer Market Remain Troubling
section_path: Segments of Chinese Consumer Market Remain Troubling
section_path_text: Segments of Chinese Consumer Market Remain Troubling
summary:
Main
As we highlighted often in our Weekly China Reports last year, several segments of consumer spending in China were showing clear signs of recession - with furniture sales routinely showing the largest amount of weakness. As we continued to stress last year, the weakness in furniture sales was a clear sign to us that China's housing market was continuing to fare much worse than was widely being reported. Of note this year is furniture sales remain in contraction, but the last two months have at least shown improvement (as the overall Chinese economy has undergone a significant post-coronavirus rebound starting in April).
